category_sources: Official page describes Dwatch as a daemon watcher run from cron.
source_facts.description: "Watch programs and perform actions based on a configuration file".
display_name_sources: Official page title is "Dwatch - A Daemon Watcher".
docs_sources: Official homepage is the best available documentation surface and describes configuration-file based actions.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is empty; official homepage and source archive do not identify an official source-control repository.
tags_sources: Official page says Dwatch watches programs and is meant to be run from cron.
source_facts.description describes watching programs and configuration-driven actions.
